messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-612 — Wire step handlers for BL-528's acceptance feature (claim-without-progress auto-heal)
What it solves: READ FIRST — this is NOT a missing-spec defect: the acceptance path below
ALREADY EXISTS on main. The work is the step-handler module behind it, in the
same parcel, so run_acceptance.sh on that feature file goes green.
Approval context: BL-528 shipped and is QA-approved with its behaviour fully covered at the swarm-script unit level (test_claim_progress_sweep.sh test1-test8). This ticket buys only the missing APS acceptance gate, so it is a real cost for a contract-hygiene benefit, not a functional gap. Approve if you want future …
BL-612 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-612" (or "reject BL-612 <reason>") to act.
